title: Custom Software & AI Integrations
summary: Custom software and AI integration services for automotive, industrial, and eCommerce teams. I design ETL workflows, GIS portals, and copilots that keep operations data reliable and searchable.
exampleProject: GIS emission compliance portal with automated enrichment toolkit

title: Web Apps & Landing Pages
summary: SEO-optimized web apps, landing pages, and business profiles that plug into Sanity or Supabase and stay on-brand. Ideal for SMBs that want marketing sites and dashboards they can actually edit.

title: Data Integrations & Analysis
summary: Data integration, ETL, and analytics dashboards for automotive catalogs, emissions reporting, and AI log analysis. I connect feeds, normalize the data, and visualize it with Leaflet, Chart.js, Google Charts, or custom datatables.
